title: Bank of India Holdings Services is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Bank of India Holdings Services is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Bank of India Holdings Services family as a Credit Analyst in Bhubaneswar. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Bank of India Holdings Services:
Bank of India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bank of India Holdings Services!
